title: extensions.csv_http_server
description: Configuration for the localhost HTTP listener that serves FORMAT CSV exports. Accepts boolean shorthand or an explicit mapping. Loopback-only (127.0.0.1).

oneOf.description: Shorthand. true = enable with defaults (port 8765, dir temp/). false = disabled (same as absent).

port.description: TCP port for the loopback listener. 0 lets the OS choose.

dir.description: Directory CSV files are written to. Relative paths resolve against the manifest's parent directory.

cors_origin.description: Sent in the Access-Control-Allow-Origin response header.
